name: cortex-plugin-security-audit
description: Automated security scanning: dependency vulnerabilities, SAST analysis, secret detection, OWASP Top 10 checks. Agent runs scans, explains findings, and generates fix PRs.
author: CortexPrism

tools.name: audit_dependencies
tools.description: Scan project dependencies for known vulnerabilities using package manager audit tools.

params.name: project_path
params.description: Path to the project root directory

params.name: package_manager
params.description: Package manager to use for scanning

tools.name: audit_secrets
tools.description: Scan codebase for hardcoded secrets, credentials, API keys, and tokens.

params.name: target_path
params.description: Path to the directory or file to scan

params.name: file_patterns
params.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for files to scan (e.g. '*.ts,*.js,*.py')

params.name: exclude_dirs
params.description: Comma-separated directories to exclude from scan

tools.name: audit_sast
tools.description: Static analysis security testing for common vulnerability patterns in source code.

params.name: target_path
params.description: Path to the directory or file to analyze

params.name: language
params.description: Programming language of the target code

tools.name: audit_owasp
tools.description: OWASP Top 10 compliance check against target project.

params.name: target_path
params.description: Path to the project directory to check

tools.name: audit_generate_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive security audit report from findings.

params.name: findings
params.description: JSON array of findings from other audit tools

params.name: include_remediation
params.description: Include remediation guidance in the report

tools.name: audit_status
tools.description: Check what security audit capabilities are available and their configuration.

fields.label: Severity Threshold
fields.description: Minimum severity level to include in reports

fields.label: Max File Size (MB)
fields.description: Maximum file size in megabytes to scan

fields.label: Exclude Directories
fields.description: Comma-separated directories to exclude from scans
